reason: This is educational/instructional content—multiple-choice FLS curriculum/pedagogy questions from PracticeTestGeeks.com, not a video performance of an FLS surgical task.
note: To score an FLS task, provide a video showing actual performance of one of the five MISTELS tasks (Peg Transfer, Pattern Cut, Endoloop, Extracorporeal Suture, or Intracorporeal Suture). This image set contains teaching questions only.
